headline: Did Equinix’s (EQIX) Expanded Data-Sovereign Fabric Geo Zones Just Reframe Its AI Interconnection Story?
summary: Earlier in May, Equinix, Inc. announced the global expansion of Equinix Fabric Geo Zones, a network-level data sovereignty and compliance capability embedded in its interconnection platform across 77 metros worldwide. This move positions Equinix to address tightening regulatory requirements by giving enterprises precise control over where sensitive data travels across multicloud and AI workloads. We’ll now examine how this expanded network-level data sovereignty capability could influence...

headline: SpaceX’s $2 Trillion Pitch: Is Elon Musk Quietly Building a Backup Internet for Civilization?
summary: On a recent All-In Podcast episode dissecting SpaceX’s S-1 filing, guest investor Gavin Baker and the hosts framed Elon Musk’s privately held rocket and connectivity empire as something more ambitious than a high-growth tech company. David Friedberg argued that “having a space-based communication network, space-based data centers, and space-based communication back down to Earth wireless” ... SpaceX’s $2 Trillion Pitch: Is Elon Musk Quietly Building a Backup Internet for Civilization?
